title: Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer | Teradyne

blocks.description: The main page content is an interactive React-based product explorer/finder app rendered client-side into #product-finder-root. In EDS, this would be best represented as an Embed block that loads the product explorer application. The static HTML contains only an empty div - all content is JavaScript-rendered.

defaultContent.description: Breadcrumb navigation (Home > Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer)
defaultContent.note: Breadcrumbs are typically handled by EDS metadata/navigation, not as authored content

metadata.title: Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer | Teradyne
metadata.og:title: Defense and Aerospace Product Explorer | Teradyne

header.description: Site header with gradient teal/dark background. Contains Teradyne white logo, top bar utility links (eKnowledge, Language selector, Search), and primary navigation (Products, Applications, Services, Support, Company). The header and navigation are shared site-wide and managed via nav.html in EDS.

footer.description: Site footer with Teradyne blue logo, two-column layout: left column has footer nav links, right column has newsletter signup (HubSpot form) and social media links. Bottom bar has copyright and secondary links.

newsletter.heading: Stay up-to-date with the latest Teradyne news. Subscribe here.

blockVariants.reason: Standard embed block to reference the product explorer application. No custom variant needed - the vanilla embed block handles external content embedding.

notes: The main page content is a React-rendered interactive product explorer (#product-finder-root) that cannot be statically migrated as HTML content.
The product explorer would need to be embedded as an external application or rebuilt as custom EDS blocks.
Header and footer are site-wide components managed separately in EDS (nav.html, footer.html).
The page has minimal static content - it's primarily the interactive app.
